content:
Some recent additons, folks attending the wasm-io please spread the word!

  • Guest bindings for C,C#,C++,Go,JS/TS,Moonbit,Rust
  • Host bindings for JS/TS (can generate direct from wasm component)
  • Docs: md,html
  • Simple code formatting
  • Extract core wasm modules from component wasm
  • Publishes to Open VSX as well as VS Code Marketplace (should work with cursor etc.)

Note: The above features do not need any tooling installed as its all self contained in the extension.
Oh, I gotta go get a look at this
